MS.S: <CLASS NAME="CIM_ManagedSystemElement"><QUALIFIER NAME="Abstract" TYPE="boolean" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="Locale" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>1033</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="UUID" TYPE="string"><VALUE>{8502C517-5FBB-11D2-AAC1-006008C78BC7}</VALUE></QUALIFIER><PROPERTY NAME="Caption" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MaxLen" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>64</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="Description" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="InstallDate" TYPE="datetime"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>MIF.DMTF|ComponentID|001.5</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="Name" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="Status" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MaxLen" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>10</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="ValueMap" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>OK</VALUE><VALUE>Error</VALUE><VALUE>Degraded</VALUE><VALUE>Unknown</VALUE><VALUE>Pred Fail</VALUE><VALUE>Starting</VALUE><VALUE>Stopping</VALUE><VALUE>Service</VALUE><VALUE>Stressed</VALUE><VALUE>NonRecover</VALUE><VALUE>No Contact</VALUE><VALUE>Lost Comm</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY></CLASS>

<CLASS NAME="CIM_System" SUPERCLASS="CIM_LogicalElement"><QUALIFIER NAME="Locale" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>1033</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="UUID" TYPE="string"><VALUE>{8502C524-5FBB-11D2-AAC1-006008C78BC7}</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="Abstract" TYPE="boolean" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><PROPERTY NAME="Name" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="key" TYPE="boolean" OVERRIDABLE="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="Override" TYPE="string" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>Name</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="CreationClassName" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="CIM_Key" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="NameFormat" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="PrimaryOwnerContact" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="PrimaryOwnerName" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MaxLen" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>64</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY.ARRAY NAME="Roles" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="write" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY.ARRAY></CLASS>

<CLASS NAME="CIM_ComputerSystem" SUPERCLASS="CIM_System"><QUALIFIER NAME="Locale" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>1033</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="UUID" TYPE="string"><VALUE>{8502C525-5FBB-11D2-AAC1-006008C78BC7}</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="Abstract" TYPE="boolean" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><PROPERTY NAME="NameFormat" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="Override" TYPE="string" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>NameFormat</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="ValueMap" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>IP</VALUE><VALUE>Dial</VALUE><VALUE>HID</VALUE><VALUE>NWA</VALUE><VALUE>HWA</VALUE><VALUE>X25</VALUE><VALUE>ISDN</VALUE><VALUE>IPX</VALUE><VALUE>DCC</VALUE><VALUE>ICD</VALUE><VALUE>E.164</VALUE><VALUE>SNA</VALUE><VALUE>OID/OSI</VALUE><VALUE>Other</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY></CLASS>

<CLASS NAME="CIM_UnitaryComputerSystem" SUPERCLASS="CIM_ComputerSystem"><QUALIFIER NAME="Locale" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>1033</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="UUID" TYPE="string"><VALUE>{8502C526-5FBB-11D2-AAC1-006008C78BC7}</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="Abstract" TYPE="boolean" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><PROPERTY.ARRAY NAME="InitialLoadInfo" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY.ARRAY><PROPERTY NAME="LastLoadInfo" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY.ARRAY NAME="PowerManagementCapabilities" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>MIF.DMTF|System Power Controls|001.2</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY.ARRAY><PROPERTY NAME="PowerManagementSupported" TYPE="boolean"><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="PowerState" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="ResetCapability" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>MIF.DMTF|System Hardware Security|001.4</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="ValueMap" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>1</VALUE><VALUE>2</VALUE><VALUE>3</VALUE><VALUE>4</VALUE><VALUE>5</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><METHOD NAME="SetPowerState" TYPE="uint32"><PARAMETER NAME="PowerState" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="ID" TYPE="sint32" OVERRIDABLE="false"><VALUE>0</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="IN" TYPE="boolean" OVERRIDABLE="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="ValueMap" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>1</VALUE><VALUE>2</VALUE><VALUE>3</VALUE><VALUE>4</VALUE><VALUE>5</VALUE><VALUE>6</VALUE><VALUE>7</VALUE><VALUE>8</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER></PARAMETER><PARAMETER NAME="Time" TYPE="datetime"><QUALIFIER NAME="ID" TYPE="sint32" OVERRIDABLE="false"><VALUE>1</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="IN" TYPE="boolean" OVERRIDABLE="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PARAMETER></METHOD></CLASS>

<CLASS NAME="Win32_ComputerSystem" SUPERCLASS="CIM_UnitaryComputerSystem"><QUALIFIER NAME="Locale" TYPE="sint32"><VALUE>1033</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="UUID" TYPE="string"><VALUE>{8502C4B0-5FBB-11D2-AAC1-006008C78BC7}</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="dynamic" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="provider" TYPE="string"><VALUE>CIMWin32</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="SupportsUpdate" TYPE="boolean" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><PROPERTY NAME="AdminPasswordStatus" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 24|Hardware Security Settings|AdminPasswordStatus</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="AutomaticManagedPagefile" TYPE="boolean"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>WMI</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="write" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="AutomaticResetBootOption" TYPE="boolean"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>Win32Registry|HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\CrashControl|AutoReboot</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="write" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="AutomaticResetCapability" TYPE="boolean"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>WMI</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="BootOptionOnLimit" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 23|Capabilites|Boot Option on Limit</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="BootOptionOnWatchDog" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 23|Capabilities|Boot Option</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="BootROMSupported" TYPE="boolean"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>WMI</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY.ARRAY NAME="BootStatus" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 32|System Boot Information|Boot Status</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY.ARRAY><PROPERTY NAME="BootupState" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>Win32API|GetSystemMetrics|SM_CLEANBOOT</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="ChassisBootupState" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 3|Bootup State</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="ValueMap" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>1</VALUE><VALUE>2</VALUE><VALUE>3</VALUE><VALUE>4</VALUE><VALUE>5</VALUE><VALUE>6</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="ChassisSKUNumber" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 3|Chassis|SKU Number</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="CurrentTimeZone" TYPE="sint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>Win32API|Time Structures|TIME_ZONE_INFORMATION|Bias</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="write" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="DaylightInEffect" TYPE="boolean"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>Win32API|Time Functions|GetTimeZoneInformation</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="DNSHostName" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>Win32API|GetComputerNameEx|ComputerNameDnsHostname</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="Domain" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>Win32API|Network Management Structures|WKSTA_INFO_100|wki100_langroup</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="DomainRole" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>Win32API|Directory Service (Ds) Structures| DSROLE_PRIMARY_DOMAIN_INFO_BASIC|DSROLE_MACHINE_ROLE| MachineRole</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="EnableDaylightSavingsTime" TYPE="boolean"><QUALIFIER NAME="write" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="FrontPanelResetStatus" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 24|Hardware Security Settings|FrontPanelResetStatus</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="HypervisorPresent" TYPE="boolean"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>WMI</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="InfraredSupported" TYPE="boolean"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>WMI</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="KeyboardPasswordStatus" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 24|Hardware Security Settings|KeyboardPasswordStatus</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="Manufacturer" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 1|System Information|Manufacturer</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="Model" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 1|System Information|Product Name</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="NetworkServerModeEnabled" TYPE="boolean"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>Win32API|Network Management Structures|SERVER_INFO_101|sv101_type|SV_TYPE_SERVER</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="NumberOfLogicalProcessors" TYPE="uint32"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>WMI</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="NumberOfProcessors" TYPE="uint32"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>Win32API|System Information Structures|SYSTEM_INFO|dwNumberOfProcessors</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY.ARRAY NAME="OEMLogoBitmap" TYPE="uint8"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>WMI</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY.ARRAY><PROPERTY.ARRAY NAME="OEMStringArray" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 11|OEM Strings</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY.ARRAY><PROPERTY NAME="PartOfDomain" TYPE="boolean"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE></VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="PauseAfterReset" TYPE="sint64"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 23|Timeout</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="PCSystemType" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE></VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="ValueMap" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>0</VALUE><VALUE>1</VALUE><VALUE>2</VALUE><VALUE>3</VALUE><VALUE>4</VALUE><VALUE>5</VALUE><VALUE>6</VALUE><VALUE>7</VALUE><VALUE>8</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="PCSystemTypeEx" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE></VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="ValueMap" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>0</VALUE><VALUE>1</VALUE><VALUE>2</VALUE><VALUE>3</VALUE><VALUE>4</VALUE><VALUE>5</VALUE><VALUE>6</VALUE><VALUE>7</VALUE><VALUE>8</VALUE><VALUE>9</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="PowerOnPasswordStatus" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 24|Hardware Security Settings|PowerOnPasswordStatus</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="PowerSupplyState" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 3|System Enclosure or Chassis|Power Supply State</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="ValueMap" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>1</VALUE><VALUE>2</VALUE><VALUE>3</VALUE><VALUE>4</VALUE><VALUE>5</VALUE><VALUE>6</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="ResetCount" TYPE="sint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 23|System Reset|Reset Count</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="ResetLimit" TYPE="sint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 23|System Reset| Reset Limit</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY.ARRAY NAME="SupportContactDescription" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>Win32API|GetPrivateProfileString|Support Information</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY.ARRAY><PROPERTY NAME="SystemFamily" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 1|System Information|Family</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="SystemSKUNumber" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 1|System Information|SKU Number</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="SystemStartupDelay" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="DEPRECATED" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>Win32API|GetPrivateProfileInt|Boot Loader|timeout</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="Privileges" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SeSystemEnvironmentPrivilege</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="write" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY.ARRAY NAME="SystemStartupOptions" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="DEPRECATED" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>Win32API|GetPrivateProfileSection|Operating Systems</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="Privileges" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SeSystemEnvironmentPrivilege</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="write" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY.ARRAY><PROPERTY NAME="SystemStartupSetting" TYPE="uint8"><QUALIFIER NAME="DEPRECATED" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>WMI</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="Privileges" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SeSystemEnvironmentPrivilege</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="write" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="SystemType" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>Win32API|System Information Structures|SYSTEM_INFO|wProcessorArchitecture</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="ValueMap" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>X86-based PC</VALUE><VALUE>MIPS-based PC</VALUE><VALUE>Alpha-based PC</VALUE><VALUE>Power PC</VALUE><VALUE>SH-x PC</VALUE><VALUE>StrongARM PC</VALUE><VALUE>64-bit Intel PC</VALUE><VALUE>x64-based PC</VALUE><VALUE>Unknown</VALUE><VALUE>X86-Nec98 PC</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="ThermalState" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 3|System Enclosure or Chassis|Thermal State</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="ValueMap" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>1</VALUE><VALUE>2</VALUE><VALUE>3</VALUE><VALUE>4</VALUE><VALUE>5</VALUE><VALUE>6</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="TotalPhysicalMemory" TYPE="uint64"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>Win32API|Memory Management Structures|MEMORYSTATUS|dwTotalPhys</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="UserName" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>Win32API|System Information Functions|GetUserName</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="WakeUpType" TYPE="uint16"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>SMBIOS|Type 1|System Information|Wake-up Type</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><PROPERTY NAME="Workgroup" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="MappingStrings" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE></VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="read" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="write" TYPE="boolean"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PROPERTY><METHOD NAME="Rename" TYPE="uint32"><QUALIFIER NAME="Implemented" TYPE="boolean" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="ValueMap" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>0</VALUE><VALUE>..</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><PARAMETER NAME="Name" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="ID" TYPE="sint32" OVERRIDABLE="false"><VALUE>0</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="In" TYPE="boolean" OVERRIDABLE="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PARAMETER><PARAMETER NAME="Password" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="ID" TYPE="sint32" OVERRIDABLE="false"><VALUE>1</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="In" TYPE="boolean" OVERRIDABLE="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PARAMETER><PARAMETER NAME="UserName" OVERRIDABLE="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PARAMETER></METHOD><METHOD NAME="JoinDomainOrWorkgroup" TYPE="uint32"><QUALIFIER NAME="Implemented" TYPE="boolean" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="ValueMap" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>0</VALUE><VALUE>..</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><PARAMETER NAME="AccountOU" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="ID" TYPE="sint32" OVERRIDABLE="false"><VALUE>3</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="In" TYPE="boolean" OVERRIDABLE="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PARAMETER><PARAMETER NAME="FJoinOptions" TYPE="uint32"><QUALIFIER NAME="BitMap" OVERRIDABLE="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PARAMETER><PARAMETER NAME="Password" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="ID" TYPE="sint32" OVERRIDABLE="false"><VALUE>1</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="In" TYPE="boolean" OVERRIDABLE="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PARAMETER><PARAMETER NAME="UserName" TYPE="string"><QUALIFIER NAME="ID" TYPE="sint32" OVERRIDABLE="false"><VALUE>2</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="In" TYPE="boolean" OVERRIDABLE="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER></PARAMETER></METHOD><METHOD NAME="UnjoinDomainOrWorkgroup" TYPE="uint32"><QUALIFIER NAME="Implemented" TYPE="boolean" TOSUBCLASS="false"><VALUE>true</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="ValueMap" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>0</VALUE><VALUE>..</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><PARAMETER NAME="FUnjoinOptions" TYPE="uint32"><QUALIFIER NAME="BitMap" TYPE="string"><VALUE.ARRAY><VALUE>2</VALUE></VALUE.ARRAY></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="ID" TYPE="sint32" OVERRIDABLE="false"><VALUE>2</VALUE></QUALIFIER><QUALIFIER NAME="In" TYPE="boolean"
